_comment: Phase 3B run-1 QLoRA config. Same base as the baseline (ollama:llama3.1:8b = Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct) so Base->SFT is apples-to-apples. Modest config: small rank + few epochs to avoid overfitting at ~400-600 demos.
serving: fuse/merge adapter -> GGUF (llama.cpp) -> quantize Q4_K_M -> ollama create auditlm -> eval rag:ollama:auditlm (tiered grounding)
